missions.title: Solutions - Section 1

microtargets.title: Types of solutions
ncertAnchors: NCERT Chemistry Class 12, Types of solutions
mustKnowFacts: Types of solutions is a fundamental subtopic of Solutions.

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Types of solutions during complex MCQs.
